title: ODI Matrix — NAICS 493120 Refrigerated Warehousing and Storage

|---|---|---|---|---|

`affected_markets` filter: all 12 PR entries carry `["Refrigerated Warehousing and Storage"]` → all merged in.

---

sections.title: Step 2 — Satisfaction recalibration (Step 03 incumbent-anchored)
sections.content:
Importance held stable across all 36 entries (importance-stability rule). Only three satisfaction moves defensible against Step 03 evidence; the rest stand as Step 06/10 LLM estimates.

| # | Orig S | Recal S | Evidence from Step 03 / Step 11 |
|---|---|---|---|
| N15 (compressor inrush absorption) | 4 | **5** | Tier-1 PCS (SMA/Sungrow PowerTitan, 4-quadrant <100 ms) demonstrably absorbs 3–7× FLA inrush; incumbent performance better than Step 06 estimate |
| N20 (HACCP audit-trail gaps during grid events) | 4 | **3** | No surveyed incumbent EMS (Fluence Mosaic, Tesla Autobidder, Wärtsilä GEMS, OEM-bundled EMS) produces time-aligned voltage+temperature trace for HACCP evidence — structurally worse than estimated |
| PR4 (LFP calendar-age reserved-SoC envelope yr 10) | 4.5 | **5.5** | Tier-1 LFP vendors (Tesla, Sungrow, CATL EnerC) ship 10-yr 85 % capacity performance guarantees; incumbent warranty envelope tighter than estimated |

All other scores stand: PR1/PR3 thermal-runaway (Moss Landing 2024 + McMicken 2019 confirm S=3 is correct — not optimistic); N13 sub-100 ms ride-through (industry weak across A2/A4/A5, packaged units variable) stays at 3; N19 early-detection (industry still weak) stays at 3.

---

sections.content:

|---|---|

| `avg_opportunity_score` | **12.10** |

**Top-5 opportunities** (desc by `opportunity_score`):

1. **N16** — "Minimize the likelihood of dispatch error letting any chamber exceed +2 °C above SLA setpoint during grid disturbance" — 17.00
2. **N19** — "Increase the ability to detect early thermal-runaway precursors with ≥30 minute lead time before suppression activation" — 17.00
3. **N5** — "Minimize the likelihood that DSO MV-feeder spare-capacity assessment reverses after 6+ months of project work" — 16.00
4. **PR1** — "Minimize the likelihood of thermal-runaway propagation from a single LFP cell compromising the adjacent refrigeration plant or IFS-bonded food-grade storage" — 16.00
5. **PR3** — "Increase the ability to detect early thermal-runaway precursors (off-gas, dT/dt, voltage deviation) with ≥30 minute lead time before NOVEC activation" — 16.00

sections.title: Step 5 — Cross-check vs Step 09 Feature-Market Fit
sections.content:
Feature-fit average (6 tech features): `(4.89 + 6.33 + 4.44 + 7.44 + 6.22 + 5.56) / 6 = 5.81`.
ODI avg opportunity: **12.10**.

| Threshold | Test | Flag |
|---|---|---|
| ODI > 12 AND Feature-Fit < 4 | 12.10 > 12 ✅, 5.81 < 4 ✗ | **not triggered** |
| ODI < 8 AND Feature-Fit > 7 | 12.10 < 8 ✗ | **not triggered** |

**Alignment notes:**
- **F4 EMS** (overall_fit 7.44, `attractive`) is the lead anchor — directly addresses **N16** (opp 17), **N22** (opp 15), **N20** (opp 15 post-recal), **N17** (opp 13). HACCP-reserved-SoC + HACCP audit-trail export are the differentiated EMS scope.
- **F5 Grid-Code Certification Delivery** (6.22, `must_be`) addresses **N12** fire-protection commissioning (opp 14) and partially **PR8** TR8 lead-time (opp 12).
- **F2 Bidirectional PCS** (6.33, `one_dimensional`) addresses **N13** sub-100 ms ride-through (opp 15) and **N15** inrush (opp 13).
- **Gap:** **N19 + PR1 + PR3** thermal-runaway cluster (opp 16–17, all underserved) is NOT addressed by any single Mein Solar feature. Li-ion-inherent risk — mitigation requires BMS vendor selection + NOVEC + compartment design + off-gas/acoustic sensors + Feuerwehr interface, none of which is a differentiated feature in the Step 09 Kano list. **Narrative + containment engineering partnership is required** for this market to proceed.
- **Gap:** **N5** (DSO capacity reversal, opp 16) is a pre-commitment risk no EPC feature can eliminate — mitigation via DSO pre-contract LoI + cold-store site screening, not via product.

---
